overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character traversing a lush, foggy meadow toward a riverside settlement with wooden tribal structures. The scene features dense wildflowers, rocky cliffs, and atmospheric teal-toned lighting with visible campfires in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: lush meadow with wildflowers and tall grass

agents.ego_description: running through tall grass and wildflowers toward the distant tree line and rocky terrain

entered.detail: dense green grass covering the ground
clusters of small yellow flowers scattered throughout the grass
bright red flowers visible in the distance
tall thin trees with white bark in the misty background

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a dense meadow filled with tall grass and colorful wildflowers including yellow blooms and red poppies. The environment is foggy with low visibility, and scattered birch trees stand in the misty distance.

events.description: terrain transitions from open meadow to rocky riverside with visible water and cliffs

agents.ego_description: navigating through denser vegetation toward rocky cliffs and the river edge

entered.detail: steep moss-covered rock formations rising from the river
dark flowing water with visible current along the cliff base
tall purple-blue flower spikes growing near the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open meadow toward a rocky riverside, where steep cliffs and flowing water become visible on the right. Blue lupine flowers line the approach to the cliff edge as the terrain becomes more rugged.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky overlook with view of riverside settlement

events.description: wooden settlement with campfires and tall structures comes into view across the river
camera passes close to yellow flowers in extreme foreground, temporarily obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: approaching the settlement while observing the wooden structures and firelight across the water

entered.detail: tribal wooden structures built on rocky outcrop with multiple levels
orange glowing fires burning within the settlement
tall multi-story wooden tower rising above the settlement
rocky cliff wall forming the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The settlement becomes visible across the river, featuring wooden fortifications, campfires, and a prominent tall tower. The character runs along the cliff edge with the stone wall on the right, while the camera briefly passes through foreground flowers before revealing more of the tribal architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge approach to settlement entrance

events.description: approaching wooden bridge and fortified settlement entrance with hanging banners

agents.ego_description: moving along the stone wall toward the wooden bridge leading into the settlement

entered.detail: rustic wooden bridge with rope railings spanning toward the settlement
tall wooden spikes and poles forming defensive barriers
tattered fabric banners hanging from wooden posts

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the settlement entrance, moving along a stone wall toward a wooden bridge. Fortification poles and hanging banners mark the entry point, while the campfires burn within the wooden structures ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty wildflower meadow that gradually opens up to reveal a fortified riverside settlement. It begins with the character running through dense tall grass and colorful poppies under a heavy fog, with birch trees fading into the distance. As the terrain becomes more rugged, the camera shifts toward a rocky riverside where blue lupines line the path and steep cliffs emerge on the right. The scene then expands to reveal a tribal settlement across the water, featuring wooden fortifications and a tall tower as the character runs along a stone wall. Finally, the movement leads toward the settlement entrance, passing fortification poles and hanging banners before arriving at a wooden bridge with campfires burning within the structures ahead.
